query: SELECT id, HEX(SUBSTRING(nomeCompleto, 1, 2)) as hex2, TRIM(nomeCompleto) as trimmed, nomeCompleto FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND HEX(SUBSTRING(nomeCompleto, 1, 1)) < '41' ORDER BY id;
